title: Scrum Framework Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Scrum Framework skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

product_vision_statement.description: Product vision statement and high-level goals defining what the team is building and the problem it solves

initial_product_backlog.description: Initial product backlog containing User Stories or equivalent feature descriptions sufficient to fill the first 2–3 sprints

team_composition_confirming.description: Team composition confirming the Product Owner, Scrum Master and development team members with their capacity

sprint_cadence_decision.description: Sprint cadence decision: the Scrum Guide allows sprints of up to one month (four weeks), but 1–2 week sprints are the most common industry practice; confirm sprint duration before Sprint 1 begins

definition_done_criteria.description: Definition of Done criteria specifying the quality and completeness standards a backlog item must meet to be accepted

team_working_agreements.description: Team working agreements covering communication norms, escalation expectations and core hours

historical_velocity_data.description: Historical velocity data from prior team Scrum experience to improve Sprint 1 capacity planning
